description.p: Deepink is an open-source, privacy-first note-taking application focused on security and user experience. Everything lives inside a single encrypted vault — your notes, files, attachments, and metadata — all unreadable to anyone but you.
With up to 80% fewer actions than other note-taking apps for common tasks, Deepink is engineered for speed, clarity, and ergonomic everyday use.

ul.li: Full vault encryption — notes, attachments, files, and metadata are all encrypted; even file sizes are obfuscated
Ergonomic by design — friction removed from the most common tasks
Workspaces — separate contexts (e.g. client projects, personal journal, health notes) inside one secure vault with no data leaking between spaces
Linked notes with automatic backlinks for navigating your knowledge graph
Nested tags with hierarchical structure (e.g. Finance/Taxes, Clients/Acme) and multi-tag support per note
Note version history — every note keeps a full change log so you can restore any previous draft
Reminders — attach reminders directly to notes and get notified at the right time with all context already open

screenshot.caption: Deepink note editor and workspace overview
